gt_provenance.details: GT = tokenizer token ids from corpus prompts (capture.py:159, types.py:121), not model outputs; vocab-disjoint split genuine by token-id partition (splits.py:67,82,86); selectivity = real - shuffle (pripert_sweep.py:92).

score_normalization.details: TTRSR top-1 raw hit rate (ridge.py:113,116); I_G raw bits (spectral_channel_mi.py:159,161); CLUB nats->bits only (club.py:198); Fano min(1,(accessible+1)/H_X). No prediction-derived denominator.

probe_not_attack.details: I_G computed from cov(Sparsify_rho(H)) + sigma only (pripert_sweep.py:76,78,104); CLUB trains its own MI estimator on (U, embedding Y) (club.py:101). Neither consumes inverter predictions/labels. Fano's M (pool size) comes from the inverter but i_g_bits does not depend on M, so the 0.958 correlation is NOT circular.

result_existence.details: Headline numbers match JSON (spearman_ig_vs_bestrec=0.9582608695652173, spearman_ig_vs_mlp2=0.9147826086956521, spearman_club_vs_bestrec=0.9765395894428152, n_finite_ig=24/32, n_converse_violations=0; L8/rho0.25/beta2 I_G=10.0136 Fano=0.9862 best=0.00242). FIXED: RESULT_TO_CLAIM L0 within-layer estimate softened to '~0.5, n=6, fragile' (point-estimate sensitive to best-def); EXPERIMENT_AUDIT.json now present.

phantom_exclusion.details: beta=0 -> sigma=0 -> I_G infinite/vacuous by design (spectral_channel_mi.py:144), serialized as null+i_g_is_inf (pripert_sweep.py:110), excluded from rank corr and disclosed (RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md:9, n_finite_ig=24/32). Principled, not cherry-picking.

scope.details: Limits disclosed: Gaussian/PCA proxy not adversarial-optimized delta (pripert.py:24), single seed + one model/corpus (RESULT_TO_CLAIM.md:21), 3-rho/depth grid (RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md:13); C3 slack/loose framing correct; C2 scoped to 'observed/tested attacks' in RESULT_TO_CLAIM.md. FIXED: RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md:25 'no probe-attack gap' now carries the 'observed for tested inverters' qualifier.

claims.impact: supported (scope: no OBSERVED gap for tested attacks; monotone tracker not tight predictor)

fixes_applied: RESULT_TO_CLAIM.md L0 within-layer Spearman softened to '~0.5, n=6, fragile point estimate'
RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md C2 no-gap statement qualified to 'observed for tested inverters'
EXPERIMENT_AUDIT.json/md written (were absent at audit time)
